channel.title: Linux on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Arrans github.io

item.title: Kareadita/Kavita
item.description: Kavita is a fast, feature rich, cross platform reading server. Built with the goal of being a full solution for all your reading needs. Setup your own server and share your reading collection with your friends and family.

item.title: tldr-pages/tldr
item.description: 📚 Collaborative cheatsheets for console commands

item.title: gentoo/gentoo
item.description: [MIRROR] Official Gentoo ebuild repository

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: DrewThomasson/ebook2audiobook
item.description: Convert ebooks to audiobooks with chapters and metadata using dynamic AI models and voice cloning. Supports 1,107+ languages!

item.title: Canop/dysk
item.description: A linux utility to get information on filesystems, like df but better

item.title: cowtoolz/webcamize
item.description: Use (almost) any camera as a webcam

item.title: invoke-ai/InvokeAI
item.description: Invoke is a leading creative engine for Stable Diffusion models, empowering professionals, artists, and enthusiasts to generate and create visual media using the latest AI-driven technologies. The solution offers an industry leading WebUI, and serves as the foundation for multiple commercial products.

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: amir1376/ab-download-manager
item.description: A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads

item.title: termux/termux-app
item.description: Termux - a terminal emulator application for Android OS extendible by variety of packages.

item.title: wailsapp/wails
item.description: Create beautiful applications using Go

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source music client! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: armbian/build
item.description: Armbian Linux build framework generates custom Debian or Ubuntu image for x86, aarch64, riscv64 & armhf

item.title: alacritty/alacritty
item.description: A cross-platform, OpenGL terminal emulator.

item.title: boltgolt/howdy
item.description: 🛡️ Windows Hello™ style facial authentication for Linux

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

item.title: ventoy/Ventoy
item.description: A new bootable USB solution.

item.title: muesli/duf
item.description: Disk Usage/Free Utility - a better ‘df’ alternative

item.title: strawberrymusicplayer/strawberry
item.description: 🍓 Strawberry Music Player

item.title: quexten/goldwarden
item.description: A feature-packed Bitwarden compatible desktop client

item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: cogentcore/core
item.description: A free and open source framework for building powerful, fast, elegant 2D and 3D apps that run on macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, Android, and web with a single Go codebase, allowing you to Code Once, Run Everywhere.

item.title: coastalwhite/lemurs
item.description: A customizable TUI display/login manager written in Rust 🐒

item.title: jart/cosmopolitan
item.description: build-once run-anywhere c library

item.title: 89luca89/distrobox
item.description: Use any linux distribution inside your terminal. Enable both backward and forward compatibility with software and freedom to use whatever distribution you’re more comfortable with. Mirror available at: https://gitlab.com/89luca89/distrobox

item.title: flightlessmango/MangoHud
item.description: A Vulkan and OpenGL overlay for monitoring FPS, temperatures, CPU/GPU load and more. Discord: https://discordapp.com/invite/Gj5YmBb

item.title: GyulyVGC/sniffnet
item.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: systemd/systemd
item.description: The systemd System and Service Manager

item.title: Syllo/nvtop
item.description: GPU & Accelerator process monitoring for AMD, Apple, Huawei, Intel, NVIDIA and Qualcomm

item.title: Lymphatus/caesium-image-compressor
item.description: Caesium is an image compression software that helps you store, send and share digital pictures, supporting JPG, PNG, WebP and TIFF formats. You can quickly reduce the file size (and resolution, if you want) by preserving the overall quality of the image.

item.title: twpayne/chezmoi
item.description: Manage your dotfiles across multiple diverse machines, securely.

item.title: Spotifyd/spotifyd
item.description: A spotify daemon

item.title: warpdotdev/Warp
item.description: Warp is a modern, Rust-based terminal with AI built in so you and your team can build great software, faster.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: keepassxreboot/keepassxc
item.description: KeePassXC is a cross-platform community-driven port of the Windows application “Keepass Password Safe”.

item.title: waydroid/waydroid
item.description: Waydroid uses a container-based approach to boot a full Android system on a regular GNU/Linux system like Ubuntu.

item.title: Foundry376/Mailspring
item.description: 💌 A beautiful, fast and fully open source mail client for Mac, Windows and Linux.

item.title: krallin/tini
item.description: A tiny but valid init for containers

item.title: PowerShell/PowerShell
item.description: PowerShell for every system!

item.title: TheZoraiz/ascii-image-converter
item.description: A cross-platform command-line tool to convert images into ascii art and print them on the console. Now supports braille art!

item.title: CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB
item.description: Open source RGB lighting control that doesn’t depend on manufacturer software. Supports Windows, Linux, MacOS. Mirror of https://gitlab.com/CalcProgrammer1/OpenRGB. Releases can be found on GitLab.

item.title: authpass/authpass
item.description: AuthPass - Password Manager based on Flutter for all platforms. Keepass 2.x (kdbx 3.x) compatible.

item.title: leanflutter/window_manager
item.description: The window_manager plugin provides comprehensive window management capabilities for Flutter desktop applications, enabling full control over window size, position, appearance, close behavior, and listening to events.

item.title: FrancescoCeruti/linux-show-player
item.description: Linux Show Player - Cue player designed for stage productions

item.title: ksnip/ksnip
item.description: ksnip the cross-platform screenshot and annotation tool

item.title: rancher-sandbox/rancher-desktop
item.description: Container Management and Kubernetes on the Desktop

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: shellhub-io/shellhub
item.description: 💻 Get seamless remote access to any Linux device. Centralized SSH for the edge and cloud computing

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: PicGuard/PicGuard
item.description: Your pictures, your signature.

item.title: pkgforge/soar
item.description: A fast, modern package manager for Static Binaries, Portable Formats (AppImage|AppBundle|FlatImage|Runimage) & More [maintainer=@QaidVoid]

item.title: brandonp2412/Flexify
item.description: The fastest Gym Tracking App 💪

item.title: etlegacy/etlegacy
item.description: ET: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory which was released in 2010 under the terms of the GPLv3 license.

item.title: ayn2op/discordo
item.description: A lightweight, secure, and feature-rich Discord terminal (TUI) client.

item.title: Nheko-Reborn/nheko
item.description: Desktop client for Matrix using Qt and C++20.

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).

item.title: vkohaupt/vokoscreenNG
item.description: vokoscreenNG is a powerful screencast creator in many languages to record the screen, an area or a window (Linux only). Recording of audio from multiple sources is supported. With the built-in camera support, you can make your video more personal. Other tools such as systray, magnifying glass, countdown, timer, Showclick and Halo support will help

item.title: AppImageCommunity/AppImageUpdate
item.description: AppImageUpdate lets you update AppImages in a decentral way using information embedded in the AppImage itself.

item.title: ngircd/ngircd
item.description: Free, portable and lightweight Internet Relay Chat server

item.title: salvadordf/CEF4Delphi
item.description: CEF4Delphi is an open source project to embed Chromium-based browsers in applications made with Delphi or Lazarus/FPC for Windows, Linux and MacOS.

item.title: vcmi/vcmi
item.description: Open-source engine for Heroes of Might and Magic III

item.title: trimstray/test-your-sysadmin-skills
item.description: A collection of Linux Sysadmin Test Questions and Answers. Test your knowledge and skills in different fields with these Q/A.

item.title: ubuntu-flutter-community/musicpod
item.description: Music, radio, television and podcast player for Ubuntu, Windows, MacOs and maybe soon Android

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: go-flutter-desktop/go-flutter
item.description: Flutter on Windows, MacOS and Linux - based on Flutter Embedding, Go and GLFW.

item.title: vvaltchev/tilck
item.description: A Tiny Linux-Compatible Kernel

item.title: linux-application-whitelisting/fapolicyd
item.description: File Access Policy Daemon

item.title: inbucket/inbucket
item.description: Disposable webmail server (similar to Mailinator) with built in SMTP, POP3, RESTful servers; no DB required.

item.title: adrg/xdg
item.description: Go implementation of the XDG Base Directory Specification and XDG user directories

item.title: xeco23/WasIstLos
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.

item.title: tomboy-notes/tomboy-ng
item.description: Next generation of Tomboy

item.title: OrangeDrangon/android-messages-desktop
item.description: Android Messages as a Cross-platform Desktop App

item.title: omegaui/linux-voice-control
item.description: Your personal, fully customizable, Linux Voice Control Assistant.

item.title: K3vinb5/Unyo
item.description: 🐙 Anime streaming and Manga reader desktop app without ads.

item.title: yeahitsjan/pawxel
item.description: Lightweight screenshot tool for designers & developers

item.title: Tanq16/danzo
item.description: Swiss army knife of multi-service CLI download utilities written on Go.

item.title: haileys/doslinux
item.description: Run Linux programs on DOS

item.title: ad-on-is/resticity
item.description: A beautiful cross-platform UI for restic backup.

item.title: dongyx/hardv
item.description: A Powerful Flashcard Program for Linux, macOS, and Other Unix-like Systems

item.title: mak448a/Qtcord
item.description: Qtcord is a Discord client built with Qt aiming to bring a lightweight, native experience.

item.title: ruanbekker/cheatsheets
item.description: My Cheatsheet Repository

item.title: jpnurmi/awesome-flutter-linux
item.description: A curated list of awesome Linux-specific Flutter packages and projects.

item.title: WAClient/WALC
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp Desktop client for linux systems.

item.title: oracle/dtrace-utils
item.description: DTrace-utils contains the DTrace port to Linux

item.title: BenjaminGuzman/gentoo-utils
item.description: Utilities and notes for my gentoo installation

item.title: arran4/send-to-google-photos
item.description: A desktop utility to help easily upload files to google photos from what ever shell
